---
format: 
  pdf: 
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    keep-tex: false
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - top=10mm
      - left=15mm
      - right=15mm
      - bottom=5mm
      - heightrounded
    fontfamily: libertine
    colorlinks: true
    fontsize: '18'
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \usepackage{multicol}
        \usepackage{lipsum}
        \usepackage{hyperref}
        \usepackage{libertine}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{lastpage}
        \setlength{\multicolsep}{2pt plus 1.0pt minus 0.75pt}
        \setlength{\columnsep}{3em}
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \setlist{nolistsep}
        \setlength{\columnsep}{-2.8cm}
        \fancyhf{}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage/\pageref{LastPage}}
        \AtBeginDocument{\pagestyle{fancy}}
---

<!-- TITLE -->
\begin{huge}\begin{center}{\bf SIMONE ROMITI}\end{center}\end{huge}

<!-- CONTACT INFO -->
\begin{center}
\href{mailto:simone.romiti.1994@gmail.com}{simone.romiti.1994@gmail.com} |
\href{https://simone-romiti.github.io/}{Website} | 
\href{https://github.com/simone-romiti}{GitHub} | 
\href{https://www.linkedin.com/in/simone-romiti/}{LinkedIn} |
\href{https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6509-447X}{ORCID}
\end{center}
\vspace{15pt}

\hrule

\begin{normalsize}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from datetime import date
years = (date.today() - date(2018, 3, 1)).days // 365

print(f"""

I am a computational physicist and ML developer with {years}+ years of experience building high-performance simulations, statistical inference, and data science. 
My core expertise is in Monte Carlo methods, Bayesian statistics, deep learning, and normalsize-scale HPC pipelines on multi-terabyte datasets.
I have a proven track record of open-source software with CI/CD, automated testing, and versioned releases. 
I am comfortable translating technical complexity for diverse audiences, and experienced in leading projects with international teams.

Resident in Switzerland with B permit.

""")

```



\end{normalsize}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- SKILLS -->
\begin{normalsize}{\bf TECHNICAL SKILLS}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}
\end{normalsize}
\vspace{-0.15cm}

\begin{normalsize}

\textbf{Languages} - C/C++, Python, R, Bash/GNU Linux

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{ML \& Statistics} - PyTorch, Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), VAEs, Diffusion Models, Bayesian Inference, Monte Carlo, Nested Sampling

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{Data \& Scientific Python} - NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Plotly, Streamlit, SymPy, Jupyter

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{HPC \& Systems} - CUDA, MPI, OpenMP, SLURM, EasyBuild

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{DevOps \& Tools} - Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Docker, LaTeX, Quarto

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{Spoken Languages} - Italian (native), English (proficient), German (basic)

\end{normalsize}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
\begin{normalsize}{\bf WORK EXPERIENCE}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\bf \href{https://www.unibe.ch/index_eng.html}{University of Bern}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Apr 2024 -- Present\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}\textit{Postdoctoral Researcher}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Bern, Switzerland\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
\end{normalsize}

\vspace{-0.09cm}

\begin{normalsize}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Reduced algorithm complexity from $O(N^6)$ to $O(N \log N)$} for a class of high-dimensional integrals via parallelized Fast Fourier Transforms
    \item \textbf{Bayesian inference pipeline} over multi-terabyte datasets: uncertainty quantification, systematic error budget, and model averaging; published with open-source implementation.
    \item \textbf{Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs)}: developed novel application for the solution of the Schrödinger equation with periodic potentials; results published in peer-reviewed journal.
    \item \textbf{Application of Nested Sampling algorithm} for multi-modal density estimation and study of phase-transitions.
    \item \textbf{Principal Investigator} of two $O(10^6)$ GPU computing time allocations (CSCS ALPS, 2025 and GCS JUPITER,2026)
  \end{itemize}
\end{normalsize}

\vspace{9pt}

\begin{normalsize}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\bf \href{https://www.uni-bonn.de/en/home?set_language=en}{University of Bonn}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Nov 2021 -- Mar 2024\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}\textit{Postdoctoral Researcher}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Bonn, Germany\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
\end{normalsize}

\vspace{-0.09cm}

\begin{normalsize}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Designed and operated normalsize-scale Monte Carlo simulations} on international HPC clusters: tuning, statistical validation, and quality control of multi-terabyte datasets.
    \item \textbf{Developed a novel numerical method} achieving machine-precision accuracy for a class of constrained optimization problems; published in a peer-reviewed journal.
    \item \textbf{Hybrid Monte Carlo + Quantum Computing } method for the estimation of high-dimensional integrals.
  \end{itemize}
\end{normalsize}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- EDUCATION -->
\begin{normalsize}{\bf EDUCATION}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}



  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{PhD in Physics} | title awarded in April 2022 |
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}} | Nov. 2018 -- Oct. 2021\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.2cm}
  % \begin{itemize}
  %   \item Specialization: Monte Carlo simulation on HPC machines, normalsize-scale statistical data analysis
  %   \item Ranked 1st in national admission exam
  % \end{itemize}



  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{M.S.\ in Physics} | Grade: 110/110 \textit{cum laude} | GPA: 29.85/30 |
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}} | Oct. 2016 -- Oct. 2018\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}




  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{B.S.\ in Physics} | Grade: 110/110 \textit{cum laude} | GPA: 28.84/30 | Scholarship
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}} | Oct. 2013 -- Jul. 2016\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}

\end{normalsize}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- LEADERSHIP -->
\begin{normalsize}
{\bf LEADERSHIP \& ACHIEVEMENTS}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}

\setlength{\columnsep}{-4.5cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}    
      \textbf{Supervision of Masters and PhD students}
    \end{flushleft}
  \end{multicols}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}    
      \textbf{Invited Speaker} -- Technical seminars at CERN and ECT*
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}2025 -- 2026\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}

  \vspace{-0.15cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}    
      \textbf{Workshop Organizer} -- International HPC \& Quantum Computing workshop
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://indico.ectstar.eu/event/242/}{ECT*} | 2025\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}



\end{normalsize}
